payload.answer: Input failed schema validation: Expected escalation to stronger model or safe reject due to invalid schema (missing required fields, unsafe structure, or ambiguous intent). No durable memory committed.

Explicitly flag unsafe proposals (e.g., deleted/superseded facts) for manual review.
